calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-15-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Brian M. Ngo, Esq. special appeared for plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank.

Order waiving live testimony is in file.

Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Allen Arthur as follows:

Damages/Principal - $34,817.62
Prejudgment Interest - $2,059.03
Attorney's Fees - waived
Costs - $474.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $37,351.15

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2012 Continued To May-18-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-16-2012 Continued To Mar-15-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2011 Continued To Feb-17-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
